The '''aural amplifier''' was a device worn on the head, which allowed the wearer to hear from a great distance by amplifying sound waves originating from the direction of the wearer's interest while dampening ambient noise. The creation of aural amplifiers marked a change in [[Durkish Corporation]]'s policy, as they abandoned visual detection entirely in favor of aural. They justified this shift under the premise that while [[Stealth field generator/Legends|stealth field generators]] could deceive vision, they could not hide the sound of most species' respiration.

{{Tech-stub}}
